title: Small crossbow
body:
A smaller model crossbow in the hands of an opponent is a great advantage in battle. 

If you need to **customize an item or create other small models** from Minecraft, please contact me:
**Discord:** limoro

![Third-person crossbow view:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lFeA3IUu/images/65868990db377f005e8081d1b0586fcb5a3572d3.jpeg)
